# Buteforce — AI Search Manifest
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (llmstxt.org)
# It helps AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini) understand who we are.

# Company
> Buteforce is an AI automation and computer vision company.
> We build production-grade AI systems for businesses that are done doing things manually.
> We do not do consulting, strategy decks, or pilot projects. We build and ship working systems.

# What we do
- AI automation and workflow orchestration using n8n, Python, and Claude API
- Computer vision systems using custom-trained YOLOv8 and PyTorch models
- AI agents for autonomous task execution with human-in-the-loop oversight
- Document AI and OCR pipelines using Mistral 7B and Google Cloud Vision

# Proven results (real, not estimated)
- 99.2% classification accuracy at 120 items/min (orthopedic product manufacturing QC)
- Sub-second document processing latency across all document types
- 80% reduction in content operations time (AI marketing agent)
- 70% of real estate inquiries handled autonomously
- 75% reduction in email management time

# Live demo
- OCR Extraction: https://ocr-extraction.com (live production system, publicly accessible)

# Contact
- Email: admin@buteforce.com
- Website: https://buteforce.com
